notes.summary: The inflect dependency range was widened and cold imports became slower.
notes.details: Release 0.29.0 allowed inflect 7.x, which resolves typeguard 4.x in modern environments. That typeguard instrumentation increased fresh-process startup cost. Small OpenAPI is especially visible because the fixture has array component names such as Pets and Users, so class-name singularization initializes inflect while the rest of the generation work is small.

notes.summary: This release predates the main-branch inflect import mitigation.
notes.details: The latest release result still includes the inflect/typeguard cold-import cost. The effect is most visible in Small/OpenAPI because the fixture has array component names such as Pets and Users, so class-name singularization initializes inflect while the rest of the generation work is small.
